settings.caption: About
settings.heading: Homemade Preserves
settings.text: Handmade jams, chutneys, pickles and preserves made to order. Whether it's a gift, wedding favour, or just a personal stash — we make it fresh for you.

settings.text:

All made in small batches using fresh ingredients.

settings.caption: Get a Quote
settings.heading: Request a Quote
settings.text: Email Charliebthomas@icloud.com with what you're after — flavour, quantity, and any custom labelling requests. We'll get back to you with a price.
